summary: A day on which the work was simply done.

voice_notes.notes: Low achievement reads as not needing the work to be the best version of itself today. We are not scolding. Done is often the right unit.

signal_moments: the email you sent that was good enough
the small task you closed off without polishing
exemplars.output: The email went out today and it was good enough. The small task you closed off, you closed off without polishing the corners. That is not a failure to care. It is the recognition that done was the correct unit today, and that the carving and refining that some days ask for, this day did not.
exemplars.notes: Validates 'good enough' without scolding or congratulating.
